content.en:
Ye Tian didn't continue to wait for those Extreme Dao creatures to gather, there were a lot of treasures in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and he didn't want to waste time.

After collecting the resources of these extreme creatures, he left here and continued to search for resources.

Although, the resources he has obtained now are enough for him to attack the perfect controller of the Implasal Realm, but who would dislike having too many resources!

It is not easy for the Extreme Path creatures to gather, after all, they are not united with each other, and they need to negotiate with the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and then give conditions, which is enough for these Extreme Path creatures to work together.

Therefore, in a short period of time, Ye Tian will not encounter a second siege.

......

Extreme Mang Mountain Boundary.

Extreme Mang Mountain.

This is the core of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and it is also the place with the most resources, but at the beginning, there will be no Extreme Dao creatures and super perfect controllers to come here, because they can't enter.

Jimang Mountain contains a terrifying power, this power turns into a kind of light to protect Jimang Mountain, this light is also called the power of Jimang.

This kind of extreme power will protect the extreme mangshan mountain, and no matter how many super-perfect controllers break into here, they will also be shattered by the power of the extreme mang, turning into nothingness.

It is necessary to wait until the power of the Extreme Mang dissipates before the Super Perfect Masters dare to enter the Extreme Mang Mountain.

But even so, they didn't dare to fight in Jimang Mountain, because once they triggered the power of Jimang, they would still be killed by the power of Jimang.

All of the Extreme Dao creatures and super-level perfect controllers who entered the Extreme Mang Mountain were very careful, and if they wanted to fight, they would also leave the Extreme Mang Mountain.

And in Jimang Mountain, what the Extreme Dao creatures are most afraid of is the super perfect controller of the end of the world, so the super perfect controller of the end of the world is not afraid of death, and the critical moment will really end up together, triggering the power of the extreme mang.

But the creatures of the Extreme Dao didn't dare to mess around.

Therefore, the Extreme Path creatures will block this place and prevent the Extreme Path creatures from the Boundary Rim from coming here, and if the super perfect controller of the Bounded Realm comes, they will definitely be besieged and killed.

In the past, this place was reduced to a treasure land for Extreme Path creatures, and the super-perfect controllers of the Realm Rim could not benefit at all.

this day.

The power of the Extreme Mang gradually dissipated, and many Extreme Dao creatures came here, which led to fewer Extreme Dao creatures that gathered together to attack Ye Tian.

After all, they all want to obtain the resources of Jimang Mountain, where do they have time to kill Ye Tian!

As for whether Ye Tian would come here, they were even more afraid.

There are so many extreme creatures here, tens of thousands, once Ye Tian comes, he will die.

However, Ye Tian really came.

......

"Extreme Mang Mountain!"

Ye Tian looked at the Jimang Mountain in the distance, and he had some expectations in his heart.

It is said that the resources of Extreme Mang Mountain are the most, and it is even possible to give birth to Extreme Treasure Treasures, and even to give birth to treasures that are needed by those who are in perfect control of the Extreme Realm.

He was naturally interested in such a treasure land.

Of course, if he wanted to enter the Extreme Mang Mountain, he would inevitably confront these Extreme Path creatures.

But it doesn't matter, as long as they kill these extreme creatures, they will give up and will not fight him to the death.

Time passed slowly, and the power of the extreme mangs of the Extreme Mang Mountain became less and less, and it became more and more dim.

Finally, on this day, the power of the Extreme Mang dissipated, and it was possible to enter the Extreme Mang Mountain.

Wow!!!

One by one, the Extreme Dao creatures poured into the Extreme Mang Mountain, after all, if you enter first, you can be the first to reap the benefits!

And at this time, Ye Tian also moved.

But just when Ye Tian was about to enter the Extreme Mang Mountain, dense Extreme Dao creatures appeared around him.

Obviously, Ye Tian had already been discovered.

In fact, Ye Tian didn't think that his position could be hidden, and with the existence of the secret treasure of the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, he could lock his position.

If you want to enter Jimang Mountain, then kill!

"Kill!"

Ye Tian made a move, and fought with the dense array of extreme creatures around him.

There are quite a few of these Extreme Creatures, about five thousand or so.

More than 5,000 Extreme Dao creatures comparable to the super perfect controllers, such a terrifying number, those perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower could not imagine, but now they came together to besiege Ye Tian.

Thundered!!!

A supreme Extreme Dao creature fell, and although their attack hurt Ye Tian, Ye Tian had too many life-saving methods, just there were a bunch of life-saving perfection-level ancestral endowments, coupled with the dense life-saving Extreme Dao control skills, making Ye Tian almost immortal.

Every instant, dozens of Extreme Creatures fell.

In a short time, the corpses of Extreme Creatures were densely packed all over the area.

Suddenly.

An Extreme Dao creature that ranked sixth on the killing list was pinched to death by Ye Tian casually, which completely made the other Extreme Dao creatures panic.

"Run!"

These Extreme Dao creatures were finally scared and didn't dare to besiege Ye Tian anymore.

Ye Tian didn't chase down these Extreme Dao creatures, at the moment, he was mainly looking for resources, many Extreme Dao creatures were already looking for resources in Jimang Mountain, if he was a little later, the benefits would not be his turn.

Of course, he still took the corpses of these extreme creatures first, sorted out the resources, and waited for later.

Immediately, Ye Tian also entered Jimang Mountain.

The resources on the periphery were almost gone, and he directly entered the interior of Jimang Mountain at the fastest speed.

Although there are a lot of resources in Jimang Mountain, no one dares to do it, so it is peaceful here.

Entering the inner perimeter, Ye Tian sensed a lot of resources.

When you see a resource, take it directly, no matter what the resource is.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian saw a large number of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, although he was not short of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits now, but such a good thing was enough to exchange for more valuable treasures when he got to the end of the realm.

There is a lack of treasures like the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit at the end of the realm, and even the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm will be willing to trade the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit with him.

Swish!

These Extreme Dao Golden Fruits were all taken away by Ye Tianyi with a wave of his hand.

During this period, Ye Tian sensed a lot of Extreme Dao creatures, and these Extreme Dao creatures also sensed him, but they didn't make a move, they were all worried about triggering the power of Extreme Mang.

Deep in the Extreme Mang Mountains.

On top of a mountain peak, many extreme creatures gathered here, staring at a Dao monument.

"Golden Pole Dao Monument!"

They were all excited.

This is a treasure like the space-time pole Dao Monument, although the value is not as good as the space-time pole Dao Monument, but those Extreme Dao creatures who practice and comprehend the Golden Pole Dao are absolutely extremely eager to obtain such a Golden Pole Dao Monument.

The value of such a treasure is even higher than that of the Extreme Treasure.

In case of trouble, this kind of Golden Extreme Dao Monument can't be included in the Void Treasure, so it can only be held.

And Jimang Mountain contains the power of Jimang, and they don't dare to fight, for fear of triggering the power of Jimang, so they are stalemate for a while, and they don't know how to choose.

At this time, an Extreme Dao creature said, "Everyone, how about giving me this Golden Extreme Dao Monument?" I am willing to give some resources to you!"

The other Extreme Path creatures looked at him and recognized him.

Extreme Deep Sea Palace, a descendant of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, the Lord of the Fox Sun, but that Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, is just an ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and his status in the Extreme Realm Deep Sea Palace is not high.

Of course, for other Extreme Path creatures, this one's background is still very high, and it is not something they can offend!
